# Heraclitus

*544 BCE – 480 BCE · Greek (Ephesus)*

Presocratic thinker of becoming: everything flows, one cannot step into the same river twice, and the world is an ever-living fire governed by the logos, a unity of opposites in perpetual tension.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
